applies: Title 18-C (Maine Uniform Probate Code), effective 2019-09-01 — see transition_18a.

governing.title: Allowable payments; expenses
governing.why: Allowable payments and expenses in connection with an adoption.

considerations.title: Allowable payments; expenses
considerations.note: Only statutorily allowable adoption-related payments may be reported/made.

considerations.title: Allowable payments; expenses
considerations.note: Birth-parent living expenses are allowable only within statutory limits.

transition_18a: 18-C Article 9 governs adoption proceedings under the current code; §9-108 addresses application of prior laws to pending matters.
